name: cc-usage-guard
description: Pause-at-limit guard for Claude Code. A statusLine sensor records 5h + weekly rate-limit usage; PostToolUse/UserPromptSubmit hooks watch it in two tiers — a soft WARN nudge on approach, then a hard PARK that injects a STOP, schedules a one-shot CronCreate auto-resume at reset, and fires a PushNotification. Per-window thresholds; subagents and teammates (any nesting depth) wind down and return instead of parking. Each tier fires once in full per session/window-reset, then repeats as a throttled short reminder until acted on or the window resets, independently per session and per spawned agent. If the sensor goes dark (statusLine unwired, no attended session rendering, or version-mismatched halves) the guard warns once per session instead of going silently blind. State writes are atomic (a torn read can't fake a dark sensor) and a missing jq fails loud once per machine. Claude Code only (statusLine + hooks).
